image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: What if I told you your cells have a ticking clock?
Context visual: Meet telomeres — the protective caps at the ends of your chromosomes.
Escalation visual: Every time a cell divides, these caps wear down, shortening your lifespan.
Evidence visual: Telomerase is an enzyme that can rebuild these caps, but it’s not a cure-all.
Payoff visual: Understanding telomeres gives us a glimpse into the biology of aging.
Cta visual: Curious about how this affects you? Like and follow for more insights!
